title: Choose the right sandbox mode for a Phoenix pool config migration
prompt: A project is migrating from `pool: Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox` (which implies checkout on every connection request) to the newer `start_owner!/2` pattern. Write `config/test.exs` that: (1) keeps `pool: Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox` (the pool is separate from the mode), (2) configures `pool_size: 10` to support concurrent tests, (3) adds a comment block explaining that `pool: Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox` is REQUIRED in test config even when using `start_owner!/2` at runtime.
tier_rationale: Requires understanding that the pool adapter and the setup mode are two layers — a common source of confusion.
